itemListElement.reviewBody: My children have been studying in VIBGYOR NIBM for the last 5-6 years and it has been a wonderful experience.. Great infrastructure, approachable and supportive teachers,  hassle free admission process, and a parent-friendly school.. This year (2022-23) my daughter has topped her X Boards with an excellent score.. I would like to thank all the teachers and faculty members of the school for their dedication, commitment and facilitating the students to prove their mettle. Extremely grateful .. Thank You Teachers.. Thank You VIBGYOR !!

My child recently attended an iayp camping trip with the school for 3 days. It was splendid. We truly appreciate all the teachers' efforts in making this trip memorable and comfortable. Not only did the students learn survival skills, but they had an experience that I'm sure they will cherish their entire life

I am writing to express my sincere appreciation for the teachers of nursery class B. As a parent of a child in their class, I have been extremely impressed with their teaching style and the positive impact they have had on my child's learning and development.

Teachers has demonstrated an exceptional ability to create a nurturing and stimulating environment that encourages learning and growth. Their teaching methods are creative and engaging, and they have a natural ability to connect with young children and make learning fun.

My child has become more confident and enthusiastic about learning since joining class. They have developed a love for reading and are eager to share their new knowledge with me at home. This would not have been possible without Teacher's dedication and commitment to their students.

I am truly grateful for Nursery B Teacher's hard work and dedication to their profession. They are a true asset to the school community, and I believe that they should be recognized for their outstanding contribution to education.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

My child studies in the Cambridge section of Vibgyor NIBM and I am very pleased with the school environment and curriculum.
The staff of the Cambridge section are always transparent, approachable and open to feedback.
It is evident from the relationship that my child shares with her teachers and other staff that the environment harboured at the school is that of nurture and care.
I was looking for a school where my child could ask questions and learn as a two way approach and I see that at this school.
The other noteworthy aspect that Vibgyor focuses on is the wholesome development of the child.
Plenty of exposure and platforms to hone skills.
Great working culture. Pleasurable experience for student and parents. Money well spent!

I am writing this review as a proud and happy parent of VIBGYOR NIBM branch. My son started playschool and has progressed to nursery.
It is an excellent school with great infrastructure. The teaching and non teaching staff are very cooperative and prompt. Academics is covered in a very creative way for kids to understand. There are events like Hall of Intelligence, wherein kids get to showcase their knowledge.
The school focuses on holistic development of child, which gets reflected during the annual fest Viva. It's a well organized and inclusive event for parents and child.
The school offers value for money, as the teacher child ratio here is unique.
Great experience so far!
